incidents.headline: Hard Brake — Obstacle Detected
incidents.explanation: A delivery vehicle has stopped in your lane ahead. Braking firmly to maintain safe distance. Will resume normal speed once clear.
incidents.voiceExplanation: Slowing quickly — a delivery vehicle stopped ahead. Resuming speed now.

incidents.headline: Lane Change — Cyclist Detected
incidents.explanation: A cyclist is occupying the right lane ahead. Merging left to provide safe clearance. Speed maintained.
incidents.voiceExplanation: Merging left — a cyclist is in the right lane. Adjusting path.

incidents.headline: Traffic Slowdown
incidents.explanation: Traffic congestion detected on the current route. Evaluating alternate paths to minimize delay. Current ETA adjusted by approximately 2 minutes.
incidents.voiceExplanation: Traffic slowing ahead. Taking a slightly longer route to save time.

incidents.headline: School Zone — Speed Reduced
incidents.explanation: Entering a designated school zone. Speed automatically reduced to 15 mph for the next two blocks in compliance with local regulations.
incidents.voiceExplanation: Entering a school zone. Reducing speed for the next two blocks.

incidents.headline: Arriving at Destination
incidents.explanation: You'll arrive at Fisherman's Wharf in approximately 90 seconds. The vehicle will pull over safely on your right side.
incidents.voiceExplanation: You'll arrive in about 90 seconds. Preparing to pull over on your right.
